items.name: Life Domain
items.summary: Dominio clerical centrado en curacion, vitalidad y proteccion de la vida.
items.description: Seed inicial derivado de reglas basicas oficiales. Mantener la redaccion mecanica breve y ampliar solo tras validar el modelo del catalogo.

features.name: Bonus Proficiency
features.summary: Ganas competencia con armadura pesada.

features.name: Disciple of Life
features.summary: Tus conjuros de curacion recuperan puntos de golpe adicionales.

mechanics.text: When you use a spell of 1st level or higher to restore hit points, add 2 + the spell level.

features.name: Channel Divinity: Preserve Life
features.summary: Canalizas energia curativa para repartir puntos de golpe entre criaturas cercanas.

mechanics.text: Restore hit points equal to five times your cleric level, divided among creatures within 30 feet, up to half their maximum hit points.

items.name: School of Evocation
items.summary: Escuela arcana enfocada en modelar energia destructiva sin perder control tactico.
items.description: Seed inicial derivado de reglas basicas oficiales. Mantener el detalle mecanico breve hasta ampliar la cobertura de escuelas y rasgos de clase.

features.name: Evocation Savant
features.summary: Copias conjuros de evocacion en tu grimorio con menos tiempo y coste.

mechanics.text: The gold and time you must spend to copy an evocation spell into your spellbook is halved.

features.name: Sculpt Spells
features.summary: Proteges a aliados elegidos del pleno impacto de tus conjuros de evocacion.

mechanics.text: When you cast an evocation spell that affects other creatures you can see, choose creatures equal to 1 + the spell's level to automatically succeed on their saving throws and take no damage on a successful save.

items.name: Knowledge Domain
items.summary: Dominio clerical enfocado en aprendizaje sagrado, memoria y acceso a saberes ocultos.
items.description: Seed inicial derivado de reglas basicas oficiales. Esta entrada amplia la cobertura de conjuros concedidos por subclase y mantiene los rasgos resumidos hasta completar mas niveles.

features.name: Blessings of Knowledge
features.summary: Aprendes idiomas adicionales y ganas una pericia orientada al conocimiento.

mechanics.text: You learn two languages of your choice and become proficient in two of Arcana, History, Nature, or Religion.

features.name: Channel Divinity: Knowledge of the Ages
features.summary: Invocas comprension divina para dominar temporalmente una habilidad o herramienta.

mechanics.text: As an action, choose one skill or tool; for 10 minutes, you have proficiency with the chosen skill or tool.

features.name: Channel Divinity: Read Thoughts
features.summary: Percibes pensamientos superficiales y puedes dirigir la mente de un objetivo con magia.

mechanics.text: You can read a creature's surface thoughts and may cast Suggestion on it without expending a spell slot.

items.name: Champion
items.summary: Arquetipo marcial enfocado en precision atletica, resistencia y excelencia fisica.
items.description: Seed inicial derivado de reglas basicas oficiales. Esta entrada amplia la cobertura de subclases no lanzadoras de conjuros con rasgos marciales sencillos.

features.name: Improved Critical
features.summary: Tus golpes arma consiguen impactos criticos con mayor frecuencia.

mechanics.text: Your weapon attacks score a critical hit on a roll of 19 or 20.

features.name: Remarkable Athlete
features.summary: Tu destreza fisica mejora saltos, empujes y pruebas atleticas no dominadas.

mechanics.text: Add half your proficiency bonus to Strength, Dexterity, and Constitution checks you are not already proficient in, and increase your running long jump distance.

features.name: Additional Fighting Style
features.summary: Adoptas un segundo estilo de combate para reforzar tu especializacion marcial.

mechanics.text: You can choose a second option from the Fighting Style class feature.

items.name: Thief
items.summary: Arquetipo de picaro centrado en manos rapidas, movilidad y dominio de la infiltracion.
items.description: Entrada canonica ampliada para dar cobertura a una subclase clasica del SRD sin dependencias de conjuros.

features.name: Fast Hands
features.summary: Aprovechas tu accion adicional para tareas de manos rapidas y juego sucio utilitario.

mechanics.text: You can use the bonus action granted by Cunning Action to make a Dexterity (Sleight of Hand) check, use thieves' tools to disarm a trap or open a lock, or take the Use an Object action.

features.name: Second-Story Work
features.summary: Escalas y saltas con soltura poco comun entre aventureros.

mechanics.text: Climbing no longer costs you extra movement, and your running jump distance increases by a number of feet equal to your Dexterity modifier.

features.name: Supreme Sneak
features.summary: Tu sigilo mejora notablemente cuando avanzas con cautela.

mechanics.text: You have advantage on a Dexterity (Stealth) check if you move no more than half your speed on the same turn.

features.name: Use Magic Device
features.summary: Improvisas con objetos magicos incluso cuando normalmente no serias apto para usarlos.

mechanics.text: You ignore all class, race, and level requirements on the use of magic items.

features.name: Thief's Reflexes
features.summary: Actuas con una rapidez excepcional al inicio del combate.

mechanics.text: You can take two turns during the first round of any combat, taking your first turn at your normal initiative and your second turn at your initiative minus 10.

items.name: Berserker
items.summary: Camino barbaro orientado a una furia desatada que sacrifica control por agresion implacable.
items.description: Entrada canonica ampliada para dar cobertura a una subclase barbarica basica del SRD sin mecanicas de lanzamiento de conjuros.

features.name: Frenzy
features.summary: Tu rabia puede convertirse en un estado aun mas feroz a cambio de agotamiento posterior.

mechanics.text: While raging, you can choose to frenzy; if you do, you can make a single melee weapon attack as a bonus action on each of your turns after this one, and you suffer one level of exhaustion when your rage ends.

features.name: Mindless Rage
features.summary: Tu furia te blinda frente a ciertos efectos mentales mientras permanece activa.

mechanics.text: You can't be charmed or frightened while raging; if you are charmed or frightened when you enter your rage, the effect is suspended for the duration of the rage.

features.name: Intimidating Presence
features.summary: Tu sola presencia puede quebrar la voluntad de un enemigo cercano.

mechanics.text: As an action, choose one creature within 30 feet that can see or hear you; it must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or be frightened of you until the end of your next turn.

features.name: Retaliation
features.summary: Respondes de inmediato a quienes se atreven a herirte en combate cercano.

mechanics.text: When you take damage from a creature within 5 feet of you, you can use your reaction to make a melee weapon attack against that creature.

items.name: Way of the Open Hand
items.summary: Tradicion monastica centrada en dominio corporal, tecnicas precisas y control del campo cuerpo a cuerpo.
items.description: Entrada canonica ampliada para cubrir una subclase clasica del monje en el SRD sin depender de catalogo adicional de conjuros.

features.name: Open Hand Technique
features.summary: Tus rafagas de golpes pueden derribar, apartar o inutilizar reacciones enemigas.

mechanics.text: Whenever you hit a creature with one of the attacks granted by Flurry of Blows, you can impose one of three effects: knock it prone, push it up to 15 feet away, or prevent it from taking reactions until the end of your next turn.

features.name: Wholeness of Body
features.summary: Canalizas energia interior para restaurar tu propia vitalidad.

mechanics.text: As an action, you regain hit points equal to three times your monk level; you must finish a long rest before using this feature again.

features.name: Tranquility
features.summary: Tu serenidad te envuelve en una proteccion sobrenatural al comenzar el dia.

mechanics.text: At the end of a long rest, you gain the effect of a Sanctuary spell that lasts until your next long rest, until you attack, or until you force a creature to make a saving throw.

features.name: Quivering Palm
features.summary: Implantas vibraciones letales que puedes detonar despues con una simple decision.

mechanics.text: After striking a creature, you can spend ki to set up lethal vibrations that can later force the creature to drop to 0 hit points or take massive necrotic damage on a failed Constitution saving throw.

items.name: College of Lore
items.summary: Colegio bardico orientado a conocimiento, agudeza verbal y dominio de historias y secretos.
items.description: Entrada canonica ampliada para cubrir una subclase bardica clasica del SRD con fuerte identidad no dependiente de grants automaticos de conjuros.

features.name: Bonus Proficiencies
features.summary: Amplias tu repertorio con nuevas competencias tomadas de cualquier disciplina.

mechanics.text: You gain proficiency with any three skills of your choice.

features.name: Cutting Words
features.summary: Tus pullas y observaciones mordaces pueden debilitar la precision o el aplomo de un enemigo.

mechanics.text: When a creature you can see within 60 feet makes an attack roll, ability check, or damage roll, you can use your reaction to expend a Bardic Inspiration die and subtract the result.

features.name: Additional Magical Secrets
features.summary: Accedes antes que otros bardos a conjuros ajenos a tu lista habitual.

mechanics.text: You learn two spells of your choice from any class, counting them as bard spells for you.

features.name: Peerless Skill
features.summary: Tu inspiracion puede perfeccionar incluso tus propias hazanas con maestria sobresaliente.

mechanics.text: When you make an ability check, you can expend one use of Bardic Inspiration to add the Bardic Inspiration die to your roll.

items.name: Circle of the Land
items.summary: Circulo druídico orientado a la profundidad espiritual, la recuperación mágica y la sintonía con biomas concretos.
items.description: Entrada canonica ampliada para cubrir una subclase druídica clásica del SRD con soporte inicial de conjuros de círculo.

features.name: Bonus Cantrip
features.summary: Tu vínculo con la tierra te concede un truco druídico adicional.

mechanics.text: You learn one additional druid cantrip of your choice.

features.name: Natural Recovery
features.summary: Recuperas parte de tu poder mágico durante una pausa breve en la naturaleza.

mechanics.text: During a short rest, you can recover expended spell slots with a combined level equal to or less than half your druid level, rounded up.

features.name: Nature's Ward
features.summary: La naturaleza te protege frente a encantamientos y criaturas feéricas o elementales.

mechanics.text: You can't be charmed or frightened by elementals or fey, and you are immune to poison and disease.

features.name: Nature's Sanctuary
features.summary: Las bestias y seres vegetales sienten tu autoridad natural y dudan antes de atacarte.

mechanics.text: Beasts and plants must make a Wisdom saving throw before choosing you as a target for an attack or harmful spell.
